race.comment: RULE THE NIGHT (1) wasn't far away on debut last start over 1200m at Doomben, finishing second and beaten 0.8 lengths. Has upside and can open his account against this line-up. ZOU ZOU KAPADOKIA (4) ran on well to get up for third at his latest appearance at Ipswich over 1350m. Good signs last time and can play a major role. BEL TIRO (8) fresh up after just one run in the first campaign where she finished among the placegetters at Sunshine Coast. Will strip fitter for recent trials and must be included in calculations. YELLOW CRATE (12) finished third last time over 1400m at Beaudesert, beaten 0.8 lengths. Finds a tougher race but she has the talent to test this line-up.
